周一，中国成功地向月球发送了最新的to娥飞行任务。娥五号是迄今为止最雄心勃勃的，如果成功，它将使中国成为第三个从月球表面送回样品的国家（仅次于苏联和美国）。尽管任务非常复杂，并且可能会出错，但任务执行的时间很短，因此我们会在三周内很好地了解事情的进展。
  中国的s娥计划以月亮女神的名字命名，始于2007年with娥一号轨道器的发射。随着时间的推移，任务变得越来越复杂。 '娥三号在月球表面看到了一辆漫游车的部署，Chang娥四号在月球另一侧首次降落创造了历史。这些任务已经产生了令人兴奋的科学数据，并提供了许多以前未曾探索过的月球区域的照片。
 现在，中国计划从月球上取回一些不能提炼成一串零的东西。与之前的两次任务一样，Chang娥五号到达月球轨道后，它将在地面上部署着陆器。但是这次，着陆器将配备一个样品返回车。在使用钻头和铲子将重达2千克的物料装载后，样品返回车将从月球表面升起并与将其带到月球的车辆会合。
    一旦样品返回飞行器和轨道器重新结合，样品将被转移到一个再进入舱中，轨道器将返回地球。然后，再入舱将与其余硬件分离，样品将在内蒙古地区降落。
 总而言之，任务非常复杂。这将需要软着陆，成功的流动站部署，样品收集和存储，从月球升空，在轨交会以及安全返回地球-所有这些都可以远程管理。这就意味着事情有很多步骤出错，除非一切正常，否则任务将终止。如果处理得当，它将再次表明中国已成为太阳系勘探的主要参与者。
  无论如何，我们很快就会知道。中国国家航天局预计整个飞行任务将持续23天，尽管这辆流动站具有成像能力，并且在完成采样后仍将保持活动状态。
 如果成功的话，月球样本将是自1970年代以来首次返回地球。中国国家航天局已经准备好指南，可以科学地使用任何成功地返回到我们星球的样本，并且它计划允许国际社会进入。
然而，从昨天的成功发射到现在，所有的硬件都已经进入月球。预计几天都不会降落，而样品会在两天后从月球表面升空。
note_en:
On Monday, China successfully sent the latest in its Chang'e missions on its way to the Moon. Chang'e 5 is the most ambitious to date and, if successful, will make China just the third country to return samples from the lunar surface (after the Soviet Union and the US). While the mission is quite complex with lots of potential for things to go wrong, it's also happening on a short schedule, so we'll have a good idea of how things are going within three weeks.
  China's Chang'e program, named after a goddess of the Moon, started back in 2007 with the launch of the Chang'e 1 orbiter. Over time, the missions have gotten increasingly complex. Chang'e 3 saw the  deployment of a rover on the lunar surface, and Chang'e 4 made history with the first  landing on the far side of the Moon. Already, the missions have produced  exciting scientific data and  lots of photos of previously unexplored areas of the Moon.
 Now, China plans to get something back from the Moon that can't be distilled down to a string of ones and zeroes. As with two earlier missions, once Chang'e 5 reaches lunar orbit, it will deploy a lander to the surface. But this time, the lander will be accompanied by a sample return vehicle. After using a drill and scoop to load that up with up to two kilograms of material, the sample return vehicle will lift off from the lunar surface and rendezvous with the vehicle that brought it to the Moon.
    Once the sample return vehicle and orbiter are reunited, the samples will be transferred to a re-entry capsule, and the orbiter will return to Earth. The re-entry capsule will then separate from the rest of the hardware, and the samples will touch down in the Inner Mongolia region.
 All told, the mission is impressively complex. It will require a soft landing, successful rover deployment, sample gathering and storage, a liftoff from the Moon, in-orbit rendezvous, and safe return to Earth—all of them managed remotely. That means multiple steps for things to go wrong, with the mission terminating unless everything goes right. If handled successfully, it will provide yet another indication that China has become a major player in Solar System exploration.
  In any case, we'll know soon. China's National Space Agency expects that the entire mission will last 23 days, although the rover has imaging capabilities and will remain active after it's done collecting samples.
 If it's successful, the lunar samples will be the first returned to Earth since the 1970s. The Chinese National Space Agency already has guidelines ready for the scientific use of any samples that successfully make it back to our planet, and it plans to grant the international community access.
 For now, however, all of the hardware is on its way to the Moon after yesterday's successful launch. The landing isn't expected for several days, with the sample liftoff from the lunar surface two days after that.
title: 成功完成迄今中国最雄心勃勃的月球任务
title_en: A successful liftoff for China’s most ambitious Moon mission to date

加利福尼亚州圣塔克拉拉县的陪审团已起诉苹果全球安全负责人托马斯·莫耶（Thomas Moyer）贿赂罪名。莫耶尔被指控向圣诞老人县警长办公室提供200台iPad，以换取四名苹果公司员工的隐蔽携带许可证。
 穆耶的律师说，他没有做错任何事，尤其是苹果公司正在支持其高管。
 苹果发言人在一份声明中说：“我们希望我们所有的员工都能以正直的态度行事。得知这些指控后，我们进行了彻底的内部调查，没有发现任何不当行为。”
 还被起诉的还有圣塔克拉拉县警长劳里·史密斯办公室的两名官员。这些官员被指控索要所谓的贿赂。
 加利福尼亚州法律赋予治安官广泛的自由裁量权，以决定谁获得在该州携带隐蔽武器的许可。史密斯以前曾面临指控，指称她的办公室故意扣留许可携带隐藏武器，直到申请人向史密斯求助。 NBC湾区地区在6月份进行的一项调查发现，史密斯连任竞选活动的捐赠者获得隐蔽携带许可证的可能性是不捐赠者的14倍。
 史密斯办公室的新闻稿将起诉书描述为“我们组织的艰难时期”。
 负责起诉的圣塔克拉拉地区检察官杰夫·罗森（Jeff Rosen）表示，在罗森（Rosen）获得该案的搜查令后的最后一刻，捐赠的200台iPad遭到破坏。
据LinkedIn称，Moyer负责“苹果公司企业和零售安全的战略管理，危机管理，高管保护，调查和新产品保密”。
 虽然在史密斯警长办公室里有两个人被起诉，但史密斯本人并未受到任何指控。罗森说，调查正在进行中。常见的检举策略是首先关注排名较低的员工，以迫使他们提供不利于其老板的证据。
  在他起诉Moyer的同一天，罗森（Rosen）还起诉了保险经纪人Harpreet Chadha，后者还向圣塔克拉拉警长办公室寻求隐蔽的携带许可证。 Chadha被指控在圣何塞鲨鱼比赛中向史密斯提供一张价值6,000美元的豪华套票门票。
 “警长劳里·史密斯的家人和她的一些最大的支持者举行庆祝她蝉联在查达的套件警长，”罗森说。
  8月，罗森（Rosen）在涉及圣塔克拉拉县警长办公室的另一项贿赂计划中指控四人。据称，该计划涉及一笔竞选捐款，以换取隐蔽的携带许可证。其中一名被告是詹姆士·詹森（James Jensen），是警长的上尉，他还于上周对苹果的莫耶（Moyer）提出起诉。
 八月份的起诉书着重于努力为一家向Facebook高管提供安全保障的公司获得隐藏的携带许可证。
 其中一名被告写给本案的律师说：“我需要你见识管理Facebook Executive保护团队的好友。这可能是5万美元。”
据称，密谋者随后在圣何塞·詹巴果汁（San Jose Jamba Juice）会面，并据称达成了一项协议，警长办公室将提供10至12份隐藏的随身携带的许可证，以换取价值90,000美元的竞选捐款。
note_en:
A grand jury in California's Santa Clara County has indicted Thomas Moyer, Apple's head of global security, for bribery. Moyer is accused of offering 200 iPads to the Santa County Sheriff's office in exchange for concealed carry permits for four Apple employees.
 Moyer's attorney says that he did nothing wrong, and notably Apple is standing behind its executive.
 “We expect all of our employees to conduct themselves with integrity," an Apple spokesperson said in a statement. "After learning of the allegations, we conducted a thorough internal investigation and found no wrongdoing."
 Also indicted were two officials in the office of Santa Clara County Sheriff Laurie Smith. These officials are accused of soliciting the alleged bribe.
 California law gives sheriffs broad discretion to decide who gets permits to carry concealed weapons in the state. Smith has previously faced accusations that her office deliberately withheld permits to carry concealed weapons until applicants did favors for Smith. A  June investigation by NBC Bay Area found that donors to Smith's re-election campaign were 14 times more likely to get concealed carry permits than those who didn't donate.
 A  press release from Smith's office described the indictments as "a difficult time for our organization."
 Jeff Rosen, the Santa Clara district attorney responsible for the indictments, said that the donation of 200 iPads was scuttled at the last minute after Rosen obtained a search warrant in the case.
    According to LinkedIn, Moyer is responsible for "strategic management of Apple's corporate and retail security, crisis management, executive protection, investigations and new product secrecy."
 While two individuals in Sheriff Smith's office were indicted, no charges have been filed against Smith herself. Rosen says the investigation is ongoing. A common prosecutorial strategy is to focus on lower-ranking employees first in order to pressure them to provide evidence against their boss.
  The same day he indicted Moyer, Rosen also indicted an insurance broker, Harpreet Chadha, who also sought a concealed carry permit from the Santa Clara Sheriff's office. Chadha is accused of furnishing Smith with tickets worth $6,000 to a luxury box suite at a San Jose Sharks game.
 "Sheriff Laurie Smith’s family members and some of her biggest supporters held a celebration of her reelection as sheriff in Chadha’s suite," Rosen said.
  In August, Rosen  charged four people in another bribery scheme involving the Santa Clara County Sheriff's office. The alleged scheme involved a trade of campaign donations for concealed carry permits. One of the defendants, James Jensen, was a sheriff's captain who was also charged in last week's indictment of Apple's Moyer.
 The August indictment focused on an effort to obtain concealed carry permits for a company that was providing security to Facebook executives.
 "I need you to meet my buddy that runs the Facebook Executive protection team,” one of the defendants wrote to an attorney charged in the case. “It’s a potential $50K.”
 The conspirators then allegedly met at a San Jose Jamba Juice and allegedly reached a deal where the sheriff's office would supply 10 to 12 concealed carry permits in exchange for campaign contributions worth $90,000.
title: 苹果安全负责人在受贿指控后保持清白
title_en: Apple security chief maintains innocence after bribery charges

SpaceX Starlink工程师在周六的Reddit AMA（一切问我）中回答了问题，涉及诸如数据上限（他们希望永远不会实施），何时将Beta版扩展到更多用户以及卫星宽带服务将如何发展等话题。扩展和改变未来。
 工程师在Reddit用户名“ DishyMcFlatface”下写道，“ Starlink是一个非常灵活的系统，随着我们使软件变得更智能，它会随着时间的推移变得更好。延迟，带宽和可靠性都可以得到显着改善。” Starlink卫星天线。
   当被问及用户是否会面临数据上限时，Starlink团队给出了一个模糊的答案：“目前，Starlink Beta服务没有数据上限。”
 尽管该答复涵盖的是当前而非未来，但DishyMcFlatface随后发表的评论给出了更详细的答案，表明SpaceX正在尝试避免数据上限：
 因此，我们真的不想像过去人们使用卫星Internet那样实施限制性数据上限。目前，我们仍在尝试解决很多问题-将来可能需要做一些事情来防止滥用行为，并只是确保其他所有人都能得到优质的服务。
   许多无法获得Starlink Beta的人都热切地等待着可用性的更新，而AMA提供了答案。 Starlink团队写道，SpaceX正在“随着时间的推移稳步增加网络访问量，以吸引尽可能多的人。” “值得注意的是，我们计划在1月下旬从有限的Beta版本过渡到更广泛的Beta版本，以便为更多的用户提供参与的机会。”
     几周前，SpaceX首席执行官埃隆·马斯克（Elon Musk）在Twitter上进行了类似的更新，当时用户询问Beta何时到达佛罗里达。马斯克当时写道：“低纬度国家需要更多的卫星，所以大概在一月。”
和以前一样，希望获得Starlink的人可以在Starlink网站上输入他们的电子邮件和服务地址，并希望能收到回音。贿赂显然无济于事。当一个Reddit用户问到：“如何选择Beta版用户以及多少贿赂金额？” Starlink团队回答说：“无需贿赂，我们的目标是最终为所有人服务。”
  Starlink团队多次告诉Reddit用户，SpaceX正在寻找更多的工程师。在关于beta何时扩展的答案中，DishyMcFlatface写道：“如果您真的想帮助实现这一目标，最好的办法是将出色的软件工程师送到Starlink协助实现它。”
 Starlink生产设计，产品设计和软件中有十几个职位可用，并且可以在此DishyMcFlatface注释中找到指向职位的链接。 Starlink团队写道：“我们对Starlink的最初反应和未来潜力感到非常兴奋，但我们还有很多东西要学习。” “如果您认识任何能帮助我们的优秀人士，请让他们将简历发送至starlink@spacex.com。”
  几周前，我们写了一篇有关Starlink beta用户的文章，该用户将卫星天线和便携式电源带到了爱达荷州的一个国家森林，在那里他可以获得快速的Internet服务。但这并不意味着您可以随便拿走盘子，因为SpaceX目前仅承诺将在每个Beta用户的服务地址使用。
    一位居住并在南佛罗里达停靠的船上工作的Reddit用户想知道Starlink是否会在公海提供服务。用户写道：“一个能够为我提供可靠连接的移动系统，将使我真正有自由漫游美国沿海地区，巴哈马，甚至是更远的地方。”
  目前，我们只能在您在starlink.com上注册的地址提供服务。如果您尝试在附近的位置使用Starlink，可能会很幸运，但是服务质量可能会更差。
 一旦我们能够通过发射更多的卫星并推出新的软件来扩大覆盖范围，就将提供移动性选项，包括将Starlink移至不同的服务地址（或什至没有地址的地方！）。
SpaceX最近请求联邦通信委员会批准在“海上平台”和私人飞机上测试Starlink用户终端。
  一位Reddit用户询问卫星天线是否可以在强风中工作，例如安装在“平板拖车的尾部，该尾部飞越州际公路并陷入雷暴”时。 SpaceX小组表示，不建议将其用于此用途，并且“该碟并非为热带风暴，龙卷风等而设计”。
 一位居住在加拿大的Reddit用户问道，这道菜能否在低于摄氏零下45度的温度下工作（华氏温度低49度）。 Starlink工程师回应说，该盘经认证可以在摄氏温度范围内从零下30°到零上40°进行操作（零下22°直至104°F）。 SpaceX已执行“毫无问题地测试到这些低温”。
 研究小组还说，Starlink卫星天线“具有自动加热功能，可以应对各种天气条件。”在接下来的几周和几个月中，他们计划部署软件更新，以“提升我们的融雪能力”。
title: SpaceX Starlink的问题得到了回答：即将推出“ Wide beta”，没有计划的数据上限
title_en: SpaceX Starlink questions answered: “Wider beta” soon, no plan for data caps
